sections.paragraph:
Original: נטף

Transliteration: nâṭaph

Phonetic: naw-taf'

BDB Definition:

  1. to drop, drip, distil, prophesy, preach, discourse
    1. (Qal) to drop, drip
    2. (Hiphil)
      1. to drip
      2. to drop (prophecy)

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1355

Part(s) of speech: Verb
